NBA Daily Adjusted On-Off Boxscores

Main 3PT Luck Page 3PT Luck Adjusted Plus Minus: Totals
Daily plus-minus is incredibly noisy, and no adjustment can change that. This page uses a 3PT expectation model to recalculate each player's plus-minus as if the shooting results during their specific stints matched expectation. Like the base model, it adjusts for who shot and shot difficulty, and includes a mitigant for the hypothetical change in ORB opportunities. Key columns: PM Adj and OnOff Adj.

Generated 2026-03-28 10:47 | Source: `data/player_daily_boxscore.csv`.
